title: Inscription For A Hermitage In The Author�s Garden.
content:
This cabin, Mary, in my sight appears,
    Built as it has been in our waning years,
    A rest afforded to our weary feet,
    Preliminary to�the last retreat.
meaning:
William Cowper's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Inscription For A Hermitage In The Author�s Garden."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
